title: Chicken Jockey!
description: Replaces various sounds with Jack Black's voice lines from A Minecraft Movie
body:
resource pack jockey!

if it says incompatible just ignore it and add anyway
#### Sounds:
- [NEW] [Lava Chicken disc](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QV7tGfxa58E) from 1.21.7 over Cat
- [FLINT AND STEEL by EpochGD](https://youtu.be/00iQSiN12G8) over Chirp
- Water bucket
- I am steve (villager grunt)
- Flint and steel
- The nether (going through portal)
- The overworld (entering portal)
- Enderpearl
- Chicken
- Cave ambience
- Fuse and explosion
- Firework launch
- Slimeblock
- Lava chicken song over disc 11
- Birthday rap over disc 13
 - lava bucket
- vindicator
- eat sound
- diamond armor equip
- Opening chest
- (animated!) chicken jockey scene over donkey kong painting
![this painting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bc3e423fcbeca90ffc93d5d2f40c6d9aad50c9f.png) (this one)

please don't throw stuff in cinemas it's NOT funny
